description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Emscripten that runs on push and workflow dispatch events. The workflow uses an ubuntu-20.04 environment and runs a matrix strategy with four build types: Debug, Release, DevDist, and LuaDist. For each build type, it checks out the code, installs the Emscripten SDK, configures and builds the project using CMake, and optionally packages and pushes artifacts to a public repository.
